title: Creamy Croatian Suet Casserole
description: A hearty, earthy Croatian dish featuring suet, perfect for a sick day, made with ovo-vegetarian friendly ingredients. It has a rich, gooey texture and a savory flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onions and sliced mushrooms in a little bit of oil until they are softened.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the vegetable broth and all-purpose flour until smooth.
Add the shredded suet, egg, sour cream, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Add the sauteed onion and mushroom mixture to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 35 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
